item.title: Assets
item.description: .. ├── fonts/ ├── images/ ├── js/ │ ├── vendor/ │ ├── app.js │ └── index.js ├── lambda/ └── scss/ ├── common/ ├── components/ ├── layouts/ ├── vendor/ └── app.scss See also the Hugo docs: Hugo Pipes. Customize Doks SCSS 👉 Set variables in `./assets/scss/common/_variables.scss`. See also the Bootstrap code: Variables. ./assets/scss/app.scss Customize Doks JS ./assets/js/app.js Customize FlexSearch index See also: FlexSearch ./assets/js/index.js var docs = [ {{ range $index, $page := (where .

item.title: Google Fonts
item.description: Demo Available soon Resources Google Fonts Jost Google Webfonts Helper
